derived_from: 17-65 record (worst in NBA) confirms youth-first strategy with limited win-now pretense.
Trae Young and Anthony Davis acquisitions January–February 2026 signal medium-term contention target (2026-27 onward).
Leonsis public statements: 'these are the years to not be competitive' given strength of next two drafts; expects rebuild completion in 5 years total (3 years elapsed, 2 remaining as of 2026).
Deep roster youth (Alex Sarr age 20, Bub Carrington age 20, Tre Johnson age 20, Bilal Coulibaly age 21) precludes immediate contention.

near_term_priorities.detail: Onboarding capture: Define the evidence that would justify moving from youth-development rebuild posture into a veteran acceleration bet around Trae Young and Anthony Davis.

near_term_priorities.priority: Set the acceleration trigger for Alex Sarr / Bub Carrington / Bilal Coulibaly
near_term_priorities.detail: Onboarding capture: Define the evidence that would justify moving from rebuild posture to a veteran acceleration bet.

near_term_priorities.detail: Onboarding capture: Keep medical uncertainty from disguising fundamentally different basketball decisions.

near_term_priorities.priority: Manage apron exposure across the next two league years
near_term_priorities.detail: Onboarding capture: Convert cap posture into concrete legal trade and signing lanes.

near_term_priorities.priority: Health recovery for Trae Young and Anthony Davis
near_term_priorities.detail: Both players injured as of season end (May 2026); 2026-27 success contingent on return to form and availability.
Wizards secured their 2026 first-round pick (avoided top-8 protection); high lottery pick allows youth core bolstering.
If Young and Davis healthy, Wizards must address bench depth and rim protection (Sarr is lone reliable big).

near_term_priorities.priority: Contract extension discussions with core youth
near_term_priorities.detail: Coulibaly and Sarr eligible for extensions by 2026-27; FO must lock in core to avoid RFA complications.

strategic_priorities.recent_decision_help: Context Graph source says Washington is still youth-development oriented, but mid-season acquisitions of Trae Young and Anthony Davis create a conditional 2026-27 acceleration path if both are healthy.
